created_features.name: total_capacity
created_features.reason: Product of accommodates and beds represents total sleeping capacity, which correlates with rental price

created_features.name: bedrooms_per_accommodates
created_features.reason: Ratio shows bedroom efficiency; higher ratio indicates more private spaces per guest

created_features.name: bathrooms_per_accommodates
created_features.reason: Ratio indicates bathroom comfort level; more bathrooms per guest increases rental value

created_features.name: review_activity_ratio
created_features.reason: Reviews per booked days indicates guest engagement and property popularity

created_features.name: host_experience_days
created_features.reason: Longer-established hosts typically have better reviews and higher prices

created_features.name: days_since_last_review
created_features.reason: Recently reviewed properties indicate active bookings and market demand

created_features.name: review_scores_consistency
created_features.reason: Lower std indicates consistent quality across all aspects; higher consistency suggests premium property

created_features.name: booking_pressure
created_features.reason: Days booked in a year indicates demand; higher booking pressure justifies higher prices

created_features.name: description_length
created_features.reason: Longer descriptions indicate more effort in marketing; correlates with property quality and price

created_features.name: amenities_count
created_features.reason: More amenities increase property value and rental price
